messages.minLength: Full name must be at least 2 characters long.
messages.pattern: Full name must contain letters and spaces only — no numbers or special characters.

messages.format: Please enter a valid email address (e.g. name@domain.com).
messages.unique: This email is already registered. Each candidate must have a unique email.

messages.pattern: Phone must be a valid 10-digit Indian mobile number starting with 6, 7, 8, or 9.

dateOfBirth.label: Date of Birth

messages.ageMin: Candidate must be at least 18 years old on program start date (Jul 1, 2026).
messages.ageMax: Candidate must be 35 years old or younger on program start date (Jul 1, 2026).

dateOfBirth.softWarning: This candidate age does not meet the standard criteria (18-35 years).

messages.enum: Qualification must be one of: B.Tech, B.E., B.Sc, BCA, M.Tech, M.Sc, MCA, MBA.

graduationYear.label: Graduation Year

messages.min: Graduation year must be 2015 or later.
messages.max: Graduation year must be 2025 or earlier.

graduationYear.softWarning: Graduation year is outside the accepted range (2015-2025).

percentageOrCgpa.label: Percentage / CGPA

messages.cgpaMin: CGPA must be at least 6.0 on a 10-point scale.
messages.cgpaMax: CGPA cannot exceed 10.0 on a 10-point scale.

percentageOrCgpa.softWarning: Candidate does not meet the minimum academic score criteria.

screeningTestScore.label: Screening Test Score

messages.passMark: Screening test score must be at least 40 out of 100.

screeningTestScore.softWarning: Screening test score is below the passing threshold of 40.

messages.enum: Interview status must be: Cleared, Waitlisted, or Rejected.
messages.blockedValues: Rejected candidates cannot be enrolled. Submission blocked.

messages.pattern: Aadhaar must be exactly 12 digits — no letters or special characters.

crossField.message: Offer letter can only be sent when Interview Status is Cleared or Waitlisted.

messages.required: Please specify whether an offer letter has been sent.
messages.enum: Offer letter status must be Yes or No.
messages.crossField: Offer letter can only be sent when Interview Status is Cleared or Waitlisted.
